body: [{"ac":1,"text":"PRD line 204 cites CONTRACT-004 instead of CONTRACT-003 for the harness interface","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"CONTRACT-003 cross-references CONTRACT-004 as the source for HarnessInfo.Quota and HarnessInfo.Account population","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"primary-harness-capability-baseline.md references resolve (no deleted symbols cited)","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"AGENTS.md (or equivalent) describes the harness implementation pattern: implement Harness plus optional sub-interfaces, snapshot types package-private, no cross-harness imports, SupportedAliases/SupportedLimitIDs as the stable contract surface","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"A Go test using go/doc parses each internal/harnesses/\u003cname\u003e/ package comment and asserts the documented Supported* sets equal the method return values on a default Runner{} instance; drift fails CI","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true}]
